import io

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  mut depth = 0
  mut bad = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 40
        depth = depth + 1
      else if b == 41
        if depth == 0
          bad = true
        else
          depth = depth - 1
        end
      end
    when None
      bad = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if bad or depth != 0
    print("NO")
  else
    print("YES")
  end
when None
  if 0 == 0
    print("YES")
  else
    print("NO")
  end
end
